title: Bamboo'd
description: This mod is bamboo centered, with items like the Bamboo staff, different bamboo foods, and many more to come
body:
# Bamboo'd
### Bamboo'd adds new ways to use bamboo

Items like the Bamboo staff give more range(range not added yet), foods like the prepped bamboo and fried bamboo(in concept hell right now), and structures like the ancient altar(Next main update) add exploration and new ways to fight mobs.

### If there are bugs please report them on the github

> This has been worked on by Crit(Programmer), Zomagon(Artist and concepts), and P.(Programmer and ideas)
